articles.title_en: Vietnam Inaugurates Major Wastewater Treatment Plant in Mekong Delta, Bolstering Environmental Resilience
articles.summary_en: MONRE inaugurates a new 150,000 CMD wastewater treatment plant in Can Tho, boosting Mekong Delta's water quality.

articles.title_en: MONRE to Implement Stricter Water Discharge Standards by Late 2026
articles.summary_en: MONRE unveils stricter water discharge standards for industrial and urban wastewater, enhancing environmental protection by late 2026.

articles.title_en: World Bank Pledges $300M for Vietnam's Green Water Infrastructure via MONRE Partnership
articles.summary_en: World Bank pledges $300M to MONRE for sustainable water treatment infrastructure, boosting Vietnam's green development.

articles.title_en: Vietnam's Nationwide Solid Waste Sorting Mandate Faces Initial Hurdles in Early 2026
articles.summary_en: Vietnam's mandatory household waste sorting under LEP 2020 begins, facing challenges in public compliance and infrastructure.

articles.summary_en: HCMC's pilot waste separation program shows promising results, highlighting infrastructure readiness and public engagement.

articles.summary_en: Strict 2026 SWM regulations attract foreign investment in Vietnam's waste-to-energy and advanced treatment projects.

articles.title_en: ADB Approves $500M for Vietnam's Northern Economic Corridor Railway Upgrade

articles.summary_en: A $300M ADB loan will fund the development of a resilient power grid and renewable energy integration in Vietnam's vulnerable Mekong Delta.
